shortForecast: Patchy Fog then Chance Rain Showers
name: Today
detailedForecast: Patchy fog and scattered rain showers before 8am, then a chance of rain showers and patchy fog between 8am and 9am, then a chance of rain showers and patchy fog between 9am and 4pm. Cloudy, with a high near 58. Southeast wind 0 to 5 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
